title: magnolia × highdownensis
intro: Magnolia × highdownensis, also known as the Highdown magnolia or Highdown hybrid magnolia, is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between Magnolia × loebneri and Magnolia × soulangeana. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Magnolia × highdownensis include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant's bark and flowers are often used to create teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
